basic_details.job_title: SAIL BSL Quality Manager Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Steel Authority of India Limited Bokaro Steel Plant (SAIL BSL)
basic_details.short_information: Steel Authority of India Limited Bokaro Steel Plant (SAIL BSL) has released the official Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) Notification 2026 on 28th April 2026 at www.sail.co.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the SAIL BSL Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 55 years with a qualification of B.E./B.Tech. in Aeronautical/Mechanical/Electrical/Electronic/Avionics or Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering can attend the Walk-in Interview on 16th May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years as on 28.04.2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Engineering Degree (B.E./B.Tech.) in Aeronautical / Mechanical / Electrical / Electronic / Avionics OR Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering from a DGCA-approved organization.
qualification.details: Quality Manager (Aviation Wing): Option 1: Full-time Engineering Degree (B.E./B.Tech.) in Aeronautical / Mechanical / Electrical / Electronic / Avionics from UGC/AICTE recognized University/Institute. Option 2: Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering from a DGCA-approved organization. Post-Qualification Experience: Either 1. Minimum 02 years experience as Quality Manager (QM) / Continuing Airworthiness Manager (CAM) in an organization approved for CAR-145 / Sub-Part-G activities OR 2. Minimum 10 years experience in Aeronautical/Aviation Industry, out of which at least 05 years must be in CAMO of an organization approved for CAR-145 / Sub-Part-G activities (as on 28.04.2026).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL BSL Quality Manager post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) post at SAIL BSL is scheduled for 16 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Full-time Engineering Degree (B.E./B.Tech.) in Aeronautical / Mechanical / Electrical / Electronic / Avionics or a Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering from a DGCA-approved organization, along with specific post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) post is 55 years as of 28 April 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Quality Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by a Medical screening to assess the suitability of the candidates for the role.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type and tenure for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is contract-based for the Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) position at SAIL BSL.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SAIL BSL office in Bokaro Steel City, Jharkhand. Specific details about the exact venue and timing will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary offered for the Quality Manager post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Quality Manager (Aviation Wing) position is negotiable, offering flexibility based on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q10. Is there a specific advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the advertisement number for this recruitment is BSL/R-C/2026-03.
